chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1178 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.6068/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1 to 5 & 8. 3. For orders on CMA No.6069/2025. 4. For orders on CMA No.6070/2025. 5. For hearing of main case. 24.03.2025 Mr. Ikhlaque Ahmed Domki, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5. Petitioners have invoked the writ jurisdiction of this court to interfere in pending rent and execution matter as well as civil suit. While the petitioner remains at liberty to agitate any grievance before the court wherein the matter is pending. The recourse to writ jurisdiction is mis- conceived. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed in limine alongwith pending application/s. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
